examples: Surreptitiously Mark looked at his watch.
When I checked my statement, they were surreptitiously billing me $30 [18] per month.
My first instinct, I'm not proud to admit, was to surreptitiously look around to see if anyone was watching.
Even that journey, which was surreptitiously taped, resulted in litigation and an undisclosed financial settlement.
Sliaptsova managed to alert a local journalist by surreptitiously using her mobile phone before it was confiscated.
